root_text.an7.25:1.3: katame ca, bhikkhave, satta aparihāniyā dhammā?
root_text.an7.25:1.4: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhū saddhā bhavissanti; vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.25:2.6: paññavanto bhavissanti; vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihāni.
root_text.an7.25:3.1: Yāvakīvañca, bhikkhave, ime satta aparihāniyā dhammā bhikkhūsu ṭhassanti, imesu ca sattasu aparihāniyesu dhammesu bhikkhū sandississanti; vuddhiyeva, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā, no parihānī”ti.

translation_text.an7.25:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you seven principles that prevent decline.
translation_text.an7.25:1.2: Listen and apply your mind well …
translation_text.an7.25:1.3: And what are the seven principles that prevent decline?
translation_text.an7.25:1.4: As long as the mendicants are faithful …
translation_text.an7.25:2.6: wise, they can expect growth, not decline.
translation_text.an7.25:3.1: As long as these seven principles that prevent decline last among the mendicants, and as long as the mendicants are seen following them, they can expect growth, not decline.”

reference_text.an7.25:1.1: csp1ed16.414, csp2ed16.414, ms16A7_133, msdiv25, ndp18.170, pts-vp-pli4.23
